author.location: On iOS, Mac, Windows and Android.
author.bio: News, tips and support. We answer weekdays, 9-5, Japan time. You can reach us directly via dm or mail (support@ia.net).
author.name: iA Writer: The Writing Experience.

content.text: We're on our way to Windows now! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/reichenstein/a-focused-writing-app-for-windows
